creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Feedback received by originator:

Simon Robbins, 14.10.08, 14:47h CEST:

> > Simon, are you still interested in updating the port? Maybe you'd
> > even be interested in becoming its maintainer?
> 
> The patch provided is not up to date and also has limitations in terms
> of the icc functionality provided.  Recent discussions I've had with
> intel  sales representatives have suggested that they maybe more
> inclined to  support icc on FreeBSD directly in the future.  This gave
> me the impression that  maybe someone else within the FreeBSD community
> must be in discussions with Intel.
> 
> I am rather busy at the moment but will try to find time later this
> week to reevaluate icc on FreeBSD.  I currently use icc9.1 on FreeBSD
> for  profiling and optimization of code but am interested in using it
> more widely in  the future.
